top_signals.title: Uber-backed Lime raises $167mn in bike and scooter group IPO
top_signals.summary: Shares are priced at $25 in the deal underwritten by Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan and Jefferies
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Japan’s opposition faces a make-or-break choice over wider integration
top_signals.summary: The Centrist Reform Alliance has yet to fully convince the public of its significance, said senior opposition lawmaker Masayo Tanabu.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
